name: Banana Fritters#1
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, stir together flour, sugar, baking powder, salt and nutmeg.
2. Combine egg, milk, 1 tablespoon oil and vanilla; stir into dry ingredients until smooth.
3. In wok, heat 2 inches of oil to 375 degrees.
4. Dip banana pieces into batter; fry a few at a time in hot oil for 2 to 3 minutes or until golden.
5. Drain on paper toweling.
6. Serve with hot fudge sauce or maple syrup or sprinkle with powdered sugar.
7. Makes 4 servings.
Pineapple Fritters: Substitute 1 (15 1/2 ounce) can pineapple slices, well drained and halved, for the bananas in recipe.
Apple Fritters: Peel and core 3 large apples; cut into 1/2-inch slices. Substitute for bananas in recipe.
Strawberries Fritters: Hull 18 large strawberries; substitute for bananas in recipe.
